steps.title: Substitute x = 326 into the function
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = 55.20 - 0.16x$. To find the temperature on day 326, substitute $x = 326$:
$$f(326) = 55.20 - 0.16(326)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the arithmetic
steps.content:
First, compute the product:
$$0.16 \times 326 = 52.16$$
Then subtract from 55.20:
$$55.20 - 52.16 = 3.04$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
